description.en: A long, twisted stick of dough deep-fried until the outside turns crisp and golden while the inside puffs hollow and airy. China's classic breakfast bread, torn and dunked into hot soy milk or rice congee, with regional cousins across Vietnam and Southeast Asia.
description.de: Ein langer, gedrehter Teigstab, der frittiert wird, bis die Außenseite knusprig und golden wird, während das Innere hohl und luftig aufgeht. Chinas klassisches Frühstücksbrot, in heiße Sojamilch oder Reiskongee getunkt, mit regionalen Verwandten in Vietnam und Südostasien.
description.es: Un palo largo y torcido de masa frito hasta que el exterior queda crujiente y dorado mientras el interior se infla hueco y aireado. El pan de desayuno clásico de China, se moja en leche de soja caliente o congee de arroz, con primos regionales en Vietnam y el sudeste asiático.
description.fr: Un long bâton de pâte torsadé, frit jusqu'à devenir croustillant et doré dehors, creux et aéré dedans. Le pain de petit-déjeuner classique de Chine, trempé dans du lait de soja chaud ou du congee, avec des cousins régionaux au Vietnam et en Asie du Sud-Est.

origin.note: Regional cousins include Vietnam's quẩy, Myanmar's e-kya-kway and Thailand's pathongko, all deep-fried twin-stick doughs of the same basic idea.

ingredients.note: for deep-frying; amount absorbed is estimated

yield.shape: twisted stick, deep-fried, ~23 cm (9 in) long

keeping.note: Best eaten hot within an hour of frying, crisp outside and airy within; leftovers turn chewy but can be recrisped in a hot oven or air fryer.

method.title: Mix dough
method.summary: Combine flour, salt and baking powder; work in the egg, milk and softened butter, then add water gradually to a soft dough that doesn't stick to the bowl.

method.title: Knead and rest
method.summary: Knead about 15 minutes, then cover and rest 30 minutes before shaping into a flat rectangular loaf.

method.title: Cold retard
method.summary: Wrap and refrigerate overnight so the gluten relaxes fully.

method.title: Temper
method.summary: Let the dough sit at room temperature 1-3 hours the next day until soft and easy to stretch.

method.title: Cut and pair
method.summary: Cut into 1-inch strips, stack two strips together, and press a chopstick lengthwise down the center to seal them.

method.title: Stretch and fry
method.summary: Stretch each pair gently to about 9 inches, lower into oil at 205-220°C, and roll continuously until puffed and golden, about a minute.

source.adaptation: Frying-oil absorption estimated per this atlas's convention for deep-fried breads; water amount set at the midpoint of the source's given range.
